name: Spectre
description: Among the Transcendencies, you would be thought ignoble. Mercurial, the Spectre Just as higher states of energy seek a lower level, the Spectre known as Mercurial is a being of intense and violent energy who finds herself irresistibly drawn to scenes of strife as they unfold in the physical world.

abilities.name: Desolate
abilities.description: Grants all created illusions with this ability outgoing damage bonus.

abilities.name: Spectral Dagger
abilities.description: Flings a dagger to draw a Shadow Path, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed of all enemy units along the trail. Grants Spectre unobstructed movement while on the Spectral Path.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.description: The Shadow Step-illusion refreshes its duration upon reaching the target. The illusion has deals a portion of Spectre's damage and receives additional incoming damage.

abilities.name: Dispersion
abilities.description: Increases both the current damage reflected and current damage reduction upon cast.

abilities.name: Haunt
abilities.description: The illusion deals a portion of Spectre's damage and receives additional incoming damage. The illusion is uncontrollable, has unobstructed movement Grants the upon acquiring ability.
